title: [HMI] Mars' Flying N Diving animations
description: This pack enhances flying and diving animations, making movement feel smoother, more dynamic, and immersive. Glide through the air with style and dive with better motion that feels more natural than vanilla.
body:
**🌠Features:** - This pack upgrades your flying and diving animations with smoother motion, better flow, and a more immersive feel. Whether you're soaring through the sky or diving down at high speed, every movement feels more alive. **🔧Requirements:** - Requires [**Hold My Items v5.1 or higher**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) [![Required Hold My Items](https://i.imgur.com/Wi0gG3J.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) **⚠Report bugs and suggest here!** [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/qeYK6H3.png)](https://discord.com/channels/1346575587787014326/1420874396444135557/threads/1494699206990888970) ![Terms of Use](https://i.imgur.com/zqDp5zR.png)
Term of Use: **_With this resource pack, YOU MAY:_** - Modify the resource pack if it's for personal use only, meaning you cannot share it publicly - Include this resource pack in your mod pack or server - Use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts - Use an edited version of this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts, if the edited version is not publicly available - Remix, transform, and build upon its assets in your own resource pack, within reason, if credit is given - Earn money using remixed, transformed, and built upon assets in your own resource pack **_With this resource pack, YOU MAY NOT:_** - Redistribute this resource pack - Port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition - Include unedited assets in your own resource pack, unless you have permission from the creator - Include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission from the creator
**[Check out my other packs!](https://modrinth.com/user/Mars_1337)** **Thank you guys so much for downloading our pack!** 😄
